texto: I believe there is an explanation for everything - although we shall never know the explanation for everything. Not everything in this world can be understood by us, nor should it be. It is not necessary.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Steve Augarde sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I believe there is an explanation for everything - although we shall never know the explanation f…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fantasy, everything, útil em momentos de reflexao.
